data.next_objective:
Task task4:
  Objective: Conduct the technical interview and record candidate responses.
data.result:
```text
1. Analyze the job description:
   - Job description is missing. Proceeding with a general Software Engineer interview assuming focus on skills from the resume.

2. Analyze the candidate resume:
   - Candidate has strong qualifications: MS in CS from Stanford, BS in Computer Engineering from Berkeley, experience at Google and Amazon.
   - Skills: Java, Python, C++, Data Structures, Algorithms, Distributed Systems, Machine Learning, REST APIs, SQL, Cloud Computing, Git, Agile Development.

3. Send interview invitation email:
   Subject: Interview Invitation - Software Engineer Position
   Email Body:
     Dear [Candidate Name],

     We are pleased to invite you to an interview for the Software Engineer position at [Company Name]. Your resume stood out, and we are excited to learn more about your qualifications and experience.

     The interview is scheduled for [Date] at [Time] via [Platform - e.g., Google Meet]. The interview will last approximately [Duration - e.g., 60 minutes].

     During the interview, you will meet with [Interviewer Name(s)] and will be asked questions about your technical skills, problem-solving abilities, and experience with [mention specific technologies or areas based on resume analysis].

     Please confirm your availability by replying to this email. If the proposed time does not work for you, please suggest alternative times that fit your schedule.

     We look forward to speaking with you.

     Best regards,
     [Your Name]
     [Your Title]
     [Company Name]
     [Contact Information]
   Tone Tag: Semi-Formal
   Personalization Tokens Used: Candidate Name, Company Name, Date, Time, Platform, Duration, Interviewer Name(s), mention specific technologies or areas based on resume analysis

4. Follow-up if no response to interview invitation:
   Subject: Following Up: Interview Invitation - Software Engineer Position
   Email Body:
     Dear [Candidate Name],

     We hope this email finds you well.

     We sent you an invitation to interview for the Software Engineer position at [Company Name] on [Date of Original Email]. We wanted to follow up to ensure you received the invitation and to confirm your availability.

     Please let us know if you are interested in proceeding with the interview and if the proposed time works for you. If not, please suggest alternative times.

     We look forward to hearing from you soon.

     Best regards,
     [Your Name]
     [Your Title]
     [Company Name]
     [Contact Information]
   Tone Tag: Semi-Formal
   Personalization Tokens Used: Candidate Name, Company Name, Date of Original Email

5. Send confirmation email after candidate confirms:
   Subject: Interview Confirmation - Software Engineer Position
   Email Body:
     Dear [Candidate Name],

     This email confirms your interview for the Software Engineer position at [Company Name] on [Date] at [Time] via [Platform].

     Please use the following link to join the meeting: [Meeting Link]

     If you have any questions prior to the interview, please do not hesitate to contact us.

     We look forward to speaking with you.

     Best regards,
     [Your Name]
     [Your Title]
     [Company Name]
     [Contact Information]
   Tone Tag: Semi-Formal
   Personalization Tokens Used: Candidate Name, Company Name, Date, Time, Platform, Meeting Link

6. Conduct technical interview:
   - Focus areas: Data Structures and Algorithms, System Design, Coding Proficiency (Java, Python, C++), Distributed Systems, Machine Learning fundamentals.
   - Sample Questions:
     - Describe your experience with distributed systems. What are some of the challenges you've faced, and how did you overcome them?
     - Walk me through a complex algorithm you've implemented. What were the performance considerations?
     - Design a system for [a relevant problem based on Google/Amazon experience, e.g., URL shortening, recommendation system].
     - Write code to solve [a data structure/algorithm problem, e.g., implement a binary search tree, find the shortest path in a graph].

7. Score candidate responses:
   - Score each area (Data Structures/Algorithms, System Design, Coding, Distributed Systems, ML) on a scale of 1-5 (1 = Unsatisfactory, 5 = Excellent).
   - Consider clarity of communication, problem-solving approach, and depth of technical knowledge.

8. Generate final evaluation report (This will be completed after the interview and scoring and subsequent tasks).

```
